user.title: Zendo
user.description: This is the companion integration for Zendo. To get started, download the Zendo app on your phone or tablet.

setup_push_notifications.name: Set up push notifications
setup_push_notifications.description: Store the JWT token used to authenticate with the Zendo push notification backend.

token.name: Token
token.description: The JWT token for push notifications.

refresh_profiles.name: Refresh people
refresh_profiles.description: Fetch the list of people from the Zendo backend and create notification entities.

send_notification.name: Send notification
send_notification.description: Send a push notification to one or more Zendo people.

interruption_level.name: Interruption level
interruption_level.description: Optional. Set to "time_sensitive" for time-sensitive notifications or "critical" for critical alerts that bypass Do Not Disturb.

deep_link_destination.name: Deep link destination
deep_link_destination.description: Optional. The ID of a deep link destination. Tapping the notification opens the corresponding view in the Zendo app. Use the list_deep_link_destinations service to see available IDs.

set_deep_link_destinations.name: Set deep link destinations
set_deep_link_destinations.description: Store the list of deep link destinations from the Zendo mobile app.

destinations.name: Destinations
destinations.description: JSON-encoded array of deep link destinations.

list_deep_link_destinations.name: List deep link destinations
list_deep_link_destinations.description: List stored deep link destinations for use in automations.
